# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
  adminUsername:
    type: string
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS1_v2
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: [resourceGroup().location]
resources:
- name: myPublicIPPrefix
  type: Microsoft.Network/publicipprefixes
  apiVersion: '2021-08-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  properties:
    prefixLength: 29
- name: myVNet
  type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - 10.0.0.0/16
    subnets:
      - name: mySubnet
        properties:
          addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  copy:
    name: nicCopy
    count: [length(parameters('vmNamePrefix'))]
  dependsOn:
    - myVNet
    - myPublicIPPrefix
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig
        properties:
          privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
          publicIPAddressConfiguration:
            name: publicIpConfig
            properties:
              publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
              publicIPPrefix:
                id: [concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicipprefixes', 'myPublicIPPrefix'), '/publicips/')]  
    enableAcceleratedNetworking: true
- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: '2021-07-01'
  location: [parameters('location')]
  copy:
    name: vmCopy
    count: [length(parameters('vmNamePrefix'))]
  dependsOn:
    - nicCopy
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: [parameters('vmSize')]
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: Canonical
        offer: UbuntuServer
        sku: 18.04-LTS
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        createOption: FromImage
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: [concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))), '/']
          primary: true
    osProfile:
      computerName: [concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]
      adminUsername: [parameters('adminUsername')]
      adminPassword: [parameters('adminPassword')]
